summary: Collaborated with engineers from 4+ countries under guidance from Google’s engineering team to support a robust Customer Center platform.
highlights: Played a key role in resolving critical production issues that pulled the platform out of a Google Code Red state, helping retain two major enterprise clients and safeguarding a multi-million dollar deal.
Diagnosed and mitigated high-impact production issues across monolithic and microservices architectures on GKE, collaborating with engineering teams in the US, Korea, and Philippines.
Designed and implemented two new features in a 13+ year-old legacy codebase with event-driven architecture, integrating with multiple microservices while maintaining system stability.
Improved system reliability through targeted bug fixes, rigorous code reviews, and technical design documentation aligned with Google’s SDLC practices.
Streamlined development workflows using GitLab Flow and trunk-based development, and built CI pipelines with GitHub Actions.
Built and maintained resilient APIs and front-end integrations for contact center products.
Helped improve platform quality through design reviews and careful test coverage.

summary: Contributed to the Donzon ad-posting platform and managed websites and server infrastructure for sister companies.
highlights: Developed features for the Donzon ad platform using Laravel.
Managed multiple websites and email servers of the sister companies in GoDaddy.

summary: Led a 5-member team to deliver a government software system with backend, mobile, and AWS-hosted infrastructure.
highlights: Led a 5-member team to design and deliver a government platform enabling citizens to report river-related issues directly to authorities.

Architected and developed the backend system powering a multi-application ecosystem, including a public reporting app, an investigator app, and an administrative dashboard using React Native and Next.js.
Deployed and managed the system on AWS (EC2, MySQL), ensuring reliability and scalability for real-world government operations.
Acted as the primary technical liaison for stakeholders, conducting client meetings, gathering requirements, and driving end-to-end project delivery.

summary: Assisted with undergraduate coursework, lab sessions, assignments, and academic record management.
highlights: Supported student learning through structured lab assistance and grading.
Maintained academic documentation and helped students understand core concepts.
Worked closely with faculty to improve classroom outcomes.

summary: Developed web applications using Vue.js, Angular, and AWS within a SCRUM process.
highlights: Built user-centric front-end components for client-facing solutions using Vue.js and Angular on AWS.
Collaborated with remote teams in a Scrum-driven development process.
Gained practical experience with cloud and frontend application delivery.
